updates.title: Notes Folders
updates.body:
Notes can now be organized into folders.

• Create folders from the Notes page
• Open a folder and add notes inside it
• Existing notes are kept in Main
• Empty folders stay clean and no longer show the welcome card

updates.title: Folder Sync
updates.body:
Folder organization is ready for account sync.

• Notes save their folder when Sync Online is turned on
• Folder assignments can restore with your account
• Folder names can sync after the note_folders table is added in Supabase
• Folder deletes also remove the notes inside that folder

updates.title: Notes Search & Counts
updates.body:
The Notes page is easier to understand.

• Search can find folder names and notes inside folders
• The top status pill now shows folder and note totals on the Folders page
• Inside a folder, the pill shows only that folder's note count
• Folder names are limited to short, clean titles

updates.title: Notes Design
updates.body:
Notes received a more polished folder experience.

• Folder cards now follow the selected Notes color palette
• Folder selection works like note selection
• Multiple folders can be selected and removed
• The new-folder dialog uses a cleaner Material-style design

updates.title: First Screen Polish
updates.body:
The first screen feels smoother and more premium.

• Welcome card typography and motion were refined
• The Enter tab fades in more naturally while it lands
• Landing glow, ripple, and press-ready behavior feel softer
• The splash experience is more immediate with less visual delay

updates.title: Themes
updates.body:
The app has a livelier theme system.

• New vivid app themes were added
• Bottom tabs and main navigation better match the selected style
• Settings includes theme controls for changing the app look
• Colors feel brighter and more alive across the main surfaces

updates.title: App Polish
updates.body:
Daily use should feel cleaner and more consistent.

• Main navigation, Settings, Notes, and shared glass surfaces received polish
• Light and dark mode surfaces feel more balanced
• Buttons, sheets, and tab surfaces feel more consistent
• Several visual details were cleaned up across the app

updates.title: Stability
updates.body:
This update includes reliability cleanup around Notes and account behavior.

• Notes folder actions are safer when used offline
• Sync actions only run when the user is logged in and Sync Online is enabled
• Local Notes still work when the account is offline
• The app keeps folder behavior consistent across Notes entry points
